title: centaurea cineraria subsp. veneris
intro: Centaurea cineraria subsp. veneris, also known as the Sicilian silver bush or veneris cineraria, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Centaurea cineraria subsp. veneris include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
